recommendations.title: Jurassic World
recommendations.overview: Twenty-two years after the events of Jurassic Park, Isla Nublar now features a fully functioning dinosaur theme park, Jurassic World, as originally envisioned by John Hammond.

recommendations.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
recommendations.overview: Three magazine employees head out on an assignment to interview a guy who placed a classified ad seeking a companion for time travel.

recommendations.title: Jurassic World Dominion
recommendations.overview: Four years after Isla Nublar was destroyed, dinosaurs now live—and hunt—alongside humans all over the world. This fragile balance will reshape the future and determine, once and for all, whether human beings are to remain the apex predators on a plan

recommendations.title: The Book of Henry
recommendations.overview: Susan, a single mother of two, works as a waitress in a small town. Her son, Henry, is an 11-year-old genius who not only manages the family finances but acts as emotional support for his mother and younger brother. When Henry discovers that the girl

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: The Guardians must fight to keep their newfound family together as they unravel the mysteries of Peter Quill's true parentage.

recommendations.title: The Fifth Element
recommendations.overview: In 2257, a taxi driver is unintentionally given the task of saving a young girl who is part of the key that will ensure the survival of humanity.

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games
recommendations.overview: In a dystopian society where the Capitol forces each district to send two young tributes to fight to the death in a televised spectacle, a girl volunteers to take her sister’s place, setting the stage for a struggle of survival and defiance.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.
